footer.tagline: Designed for clarity. Built for outcomes.

hero.sub: Vigilance Consulting builds the scorecards, trains the managers, and stays on the floor until your strategy shows up in the metrics — and the return is proven.

servicePillars.label: What we do
servicePillars.heading: Four practices, built to work as one system.
servicePillars.intro: Most consulting stops at the strategy deck. We build the scorecards, train the managers, and certify the methods that keep results compounding after we leave.

ctaSection.label: Ready when you are
ctaSection.heading: Let’s talk about the result you need by next quarter.

certifications.heading: Accredited programs we deliver.
certifications.sub: We train and certify teams across the disciplines that move strategy into measurable results — from KPIs and OKRs to ROI, leadership, and on-the-job execution.
items: Certified Strategy and Business Planning Professional
Certified Balanced Scorecard Management System Professional

socialProof.trustedBy: Trusted by teams across the public and private sector
socialProof.quote: Vigilance didn’t hand us a strategy deck and leave. They built the scorecard alongside our managers and stayed on the floor until the numbers actually moved.
socialProof.name: Full Name

strategy.title: Strategy & Performance
strategy.summary: Translate ambition into a measurable plan — and a system that keeps the organization accountable to it.
strategy.details: We work with leadership teams to define what winning looks like, decompose it into the few measures that actually drive outcomes, and stand up the cadence that holds people to it. The deliverable is not a deck — it’s a working scorecard your managers run from on Monday morning.

offerings.name: Strategy & Business Planning
offerings.blurb: From ambition to a sequenced, resourced, measurable plan with clear owners.

offerings.name: Balanced Scorecard
offerings.blurb: A four-perspective scorecard tailored to your strategy, cascaded down the org.

offerings.name: KPIs & OKRs
offerings.blurb: The right indicators, defined operationally, with thresholds that drive action.

offerings.name: Benchmarking
offerings.blurb: Compare against peers on the dimensions that decide market position.

management.title: Management & Development
management.summary: Build the management muscle that turns plans into outcomes — performance, innovation, and on-the-job capability.
management.details: Strategy fails at the front line, not in the boardroom. We install the management practices — feedback, coaching, structured on-the-job training — that compound capability quarter over quarter without bloating the org.

offerings.name: Employee Performance Management
offerings.blurb: Objective-setting, calibration, and review cadences that managers will actually run.

offerings.name: Innovation Frameworks
offerings.blurb: Stage-gated processes for taking ideas from concept to validated outcome.

offerings.name: Structured On-the-Job Training
offerings.blurb: S-OJT systems that transfer expert know-how to new hires in weeks, not years.

data.title: Data & ROI
data.summary: Put numbers behind every decision. Analyze what matters, prove what works, certify your team to do it again.
data.details: Most organizations have data. Few use it to make decisions. We help you isolate the questions worth answering, build the analyses that answer them defensibly, and certify your people in the ROI methodology so the discipline outlasts the engagement.

offerings.name: Data Analysis
offerings.blurb: Targeted analyses on the questions that change resource allocation decisions.

offerings.name: ROI Methodology
offerings.blurb: Phillips ROI Methodology applied to programs, projects, and initiatives.

offerings.name: ROI Certification Training
offerings.blurb: Certify internal practitioners so ROI work continues without us in the room.

leadership.title: Leadership
leadership.summary: Develop leaders who can mobilize people toward what is hard, novel, and worth doing — at every level.
leadership.details: We partner with leaders to grow the specific practices that move people from compliance to commitment. The Leadership Challenge® and LPI® provide an evidence-based, measurable spine; coaching and cohort work make the practices stick.

offerings.name: The Leadership Challenge® Program
offerings.blurb: Kouzes & Posner’s evidence-based program, delivered as workshops or cohorts.

offerings.name: Executive Coaching
offerings.blurb: 1:1 engagements for senior leaders, anchored to LPI data and strategy.

offerings.name: Leadership Practices Inventory (LPI)
offerings.blurb: 360° assessment, debrief, and development planning against the five practices.

hero.title: Four practices, built to work as
hero.sub: Strategy decks don’t move numbers. We build the scorecards, train the managers, and certify the methods that keep results compounding after we leave.

hero.title: Consulting, training, coaching and mentoring —
hero.sub: Vigilance Consulting S.P.C. is a Bahraini company established in 2014 by entrepreneur Kamal Yousif Al-Shihaby.

founder.heading: Meet our founder.
founder.name: Kamal Yousif Al-Shihaby
body: Vigilance Consulting S.P.C. is a Bahraini company, based in the Kingdom of Bahrain, established in 2014 by a Bahraini entrepreneur, Kamal Yousif Al-Shihaby.
The Company offers consulting, training, coaching and mentoring services.
founder.imageAlt: Kamal Yousif Al-Shihaby, founder of Vigilance Consulting

partner.title: The KPI Institute
body: Vigilance Consulting is the partner of The KPI Institute, based in Australia, offering consulting services related to Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) to the public and private sectors.

The Company also organizes public and in-house certification training programs. All services and training programs are delivered in both English and Arabic by qualified facilitators with hands-on experience in the field.

expertise.title: Where we create the most value.

areas.title: Strategy & Balanced Scorecard
areas.body: Helping public and private institutions apply the Kaplan-Norton Balanced Scorecard to build corporate and HR strategies — tailor-made for each client and aligned across the organization and its people.

areas.title: Human Resources
areas.body: Shifting HR from an operational function to a strategic partner that increases organizational competitiveness through optimized use of human capital.

areas.title: Process Optimization
areas.body: Redesigning inefficient, costly processes for internal consistency and best-fit alignment with strategy — increasing the value-added, reducing the non-value-added, and eliminating waste.

hero.title: Globally accredited training,
hero.sub: As the official partner of The KPI Institute (Australia), Vigilance Consulting delivers certified programs across strategy, KPIs, OKRs, ROI, and leadership — in English and Arabic, for public and private sector teams in Bahrain and the GCC.

highlights.title: Official KPI Institute partner
highlights.body: We deliver The KPI Institute’s globally recognized certifications under a formal partnership — the same curriculum and credential, delivered locally.

highlights.title: English & Arabic
highlights.body: Every program is available in both languages, led by qualified facilitators with hands-on experience across the region.

highlights.title: Public or in-house
highlights.body: Join a scheduled public cohort, or run a private in-house program tailored to your team and sector.

training.programsSub: Each program ends in a globally recognized KPI Institute credential. Browse the catalog below, then check the live calendar for upcoming dates and registration.
training.calendarSub: Schedules, formats, and registration are managed on The KPI Institute’s partner portal — it opens in a new tab so you won’t lose your place here.

hero.title: Tell us the result you need by
hero.sub: A three-step inquiry, then a real conversation with a senior practitioner — not a sales call.

expect: We read every inquiry. No sales chatbot, no SDR queue.
A senior practitioner responds within one business day.
First call is a working session — we leave you with something useful whether or not we engage.

hero.title: Field notes from
hero.sub: Short, honest pieces on what works in execution, leadership, and measurement — drawn from the engagements we’re inside right now.

insights.heading: The first essays are being written.
insights.body: Insights launch alongside our first published case studies. If you’d like to be notified when they go live, get in touch.

interest.label: Your interest
interest.heading: What can we help with?
interest.sub: Select all that apply. We’ll route you to the right practitioner.

context.label: Your context
context.heading: Tell us about your organization.
context.sub: This helps us scope the conversation and bring the right people.

you.label: About you
you.heading: Last step — how do we reach you?
you.sub: We respond to every qualified inquiry within one business day.

leadForm.thankYouHeading: Thank you — we’ll be in touch.
leadForm.thankYouBody: A practitioner will reach out within one business day at {email}. In the meantime, you can keep exploring our services or read recent insights.

about.title: About
